name: shopconnect
description: Sri Lakshmi Vastralayam — digital shop platform (Phase 1 MVP)

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm install --prefix frontend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix frontend
